fields.label: Source Doctype

fields.description: The text as it appeared on the invoice (before normalization)
fields.label: Raw Text

fields.description: Lowercased, whitespace-normalized version of raw text. Auto-generated on save.
fields.label: Normalized Text

fields.description: The correct ERPNext record this text should map to
fields.label: Canonical Name

fields.description: If set, this alias only applies when matching invoices from this supplier. Leave blank for a global alias.
fields.label: Supplier Context

fields.description: Whether this alias was automatically created from a human correction
fields.label: Created From Correction

fields.description: Number of times this alias has been reinforced by corrections
fields.label: Correction Count

fields.description: When this alias was last used for matching
fields.label: Last Used

fields.description: When this alias was last reinforced by a correction
fields.label: Last Correction Date

fields.description: Recency weight (1.0 = fresh, decays to 0.5 over time). Applied to confidence during matching.
fields.label: Decay Weight

fields.description: Inactive aliases are ignored during matching
fields.label: Is Active

fields.description: If this alias was replaced by a newer correction, link to the replacement
fields.label: Superseded By
